description: A designed recruitment graphic on a blue-toned background showing the raised torch-bearing arm of the Statue of Liberty. White and yellow text reads 'WWW.USCIS.GOV/JOIN', 'PROTECT YOUR HOMELAND', and 'DEFEND YOUR CULTURE'. It is a poster-style graphic with no candid photographic subject.
notable_text: WWW.USCIS.GOV/JOIN; PROTECT YOUR HOMELAND; DEFEND YOUR CULTURE
